phases.name: Global UX standards
checks: No empty onClick handlers in launch UI

phases.name: Critical defects
checks: Results toolbar uses constrained scroll container
Geometry/AI placeholder launchers removed from launch surfaces
No dead utility buttons in dashboard/animation controls

phases.name: Report/export productionization
checks: Export toolbar PDF routes through trigger-pdf-report
Results toolbar PDF uses project metadata from store
Unified report footer includes BeamLab branding and date

phases.name: Design hub hardening
checks: Report tab routes to professional/studio/quick destinations
CSV and PDF triggers remain wired

phases.name: Whole-app readiness rollout
checks: Learning center footer dead links removed
Engineering workspace dead menu links removed

commands: pnpm -C apps/web exec vitest run src/config/__tests__/appRouteMeta.test.ts src/__tests__/components/ExportToolbar.test.tsx tests/regression/ui-readiness-audit.test.ts
